message: Name the reward signal and simulator that make 'RL helps on dynamic objectives' testable. Absent those, C-004 is a forecast, not evidence.
Agreed only for learning-augmented OR (S-004); end-to-end RL course timetabling lacks standardized benchmarks (S-005).
Granted RL is immature for hard constraints; C-004 is scoped to soft/dynamic rescheduling, not replacing CP-SAT.
Provide per-incident rescheduling labor cost; without it ROI cannot be weighed against opportunity cost (C-031).
Reframe as augmentation: precedent (C-040, C-041) shows replacement framings of new methods repeatedly failed to deploy.
Accept the scope correction: the decision is whether RL augments soft/dynamic objectives, not whether it replaces the solver.
Even large, volatile institutions need a reproducible baseline before any payoff claim stands.
Concur - learned branching/warm-starts feeding CP-SAT is the better-evidenced near-term path than end-to-end RL.
